title: psychotria distinctinervia
intro: Psychotria distinctinervia, also known as the 'Distinct Vein Psychotria', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria distinctinervia include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as showing potential in treating various diseases such as diabetes and cancer. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
